profile.about: AI Engineer specializing in large language models, retrieval systems, and autonomous agents. I turn research papers into production systems — and I do it with style.

projects.title: Sensei-GPT
projects.desc: RAG-powered study assistant that answers questions from 10k+ documents with cited sources. 92% answer accuracy on eval set.

projects.title: Mecha-Vision
projects.desc: Real-time object detection pipeline for factory QA. YOLOv8 fine-tuned on custom dataset, deployed at 45 FPS on edge devices.

projects.title: Agent-Zero
projects.desc: Multi-agent workflow system that automates research reports — planner, retriever, and writer agents collaborating via tool calls.

projects.title: Waifu-Diffusion Lab
projects.desc: Fine-tuned Stable Diffusion with LoRA for consistent character generation. Custom training pipeline + Gradio demo app.

experience.desc: Shipping LLM features used by 100k+ users. Built internal RAG platform and eval framework.
Built recommendation models and data pipelines. Reduced inference latency by 60%.
